nodes.name: Gmail Trigger
nodes.notes:
Email yourself the AU result PDF. Subject = your command.
Examples:
  do result analysis       → all 5 PDFs
  arrear analysis          → arrear PDF only
  sem 3 arrear analysis    → sem 3 arrear PDF
  sem 5 full analysis      → all 5 PDFs sem 5 only
  statistics               → stats PDF only
  score card               → rank list only
  subject wise             → subject arrear PDF
  insights                 → AI insights only

parameters.command:
python3 -c "
import pdfplumber, base64, json
pdf_bytes = base64.b64decode('{{ $binary.pdf.data }}')
with open('/tmp/result.pdf','wb') as f: f.write(pdf_bytes)
text = ''
with pdfplumber.open('/tmp/result.pdf') as pdf:
    for page in pdf.pages:
        t = page.extract_text()
        if t: text += t + chr(10)
print(json.dumps({'text': text}))
"

nodes.name: pdfplumber — Read PDF Text
nodes.notes: SETUP: pip install pdfplumber on your n8n server

nodes.name: Gemini — Parse PDF to JSON
nodes.notes:
SETUP: Get free Gemini API key at https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
Set GEMINI_API_KEY in n8n Settings > Environment Variables
Free tier: 1500 requests/day

parameters.command: python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4, landscape from reportlab.platypus import (SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, HRFlowable, KeepTogether, PageBreak) from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib import colors from reportlab.lib.units import mm from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_CENTER, TA_LEFT, TA_RIGHT INST = json.loads(os.environ['INST']) STUDENTS = json.loads(os.environ['STUDENTS']) SUBJECTS = json.loads(os.environ['SUBJECTS']) GP = json.loads(os.environ['GP']) SEM_LABEL= os.environ.get('SEM_LABEL', 'All Semesters') OUT = os.environ.get('OUT', '/tmp/01_Score_Card.pdf') NAVY=colors.HexColor('#1a237e');BLUE=colors.HexColor('#283593') BLUE_L=colors.HexColor('#e8eaf6');GREEN_DK=colors.HexColor('#1b5e20') GREEN_LT=colors.HexColor('#e8f5e9');RED_DK=colors.HexColor('#b71c1c') RED_LT=colors.HexColor('#ffebee');AMBER=colors.HexColor('#e65100') GOLD=colors.HexColor('#f57f17');MGRAY=colors.HexColor('#757575') LGRAY=colors.HexColor('#f5f5f5');WHITE=colors.white def ps(n,**k): return ParagraphStyle(n,**k) def hx(c): return c.hexval()[2:] def gcol(g): if g in('O','A+','A'): return GREEN_DK if g in('B+','B'): return BLUE if g in('U','RA'): return RED_DK if g in('SA','UA'): return AMBER return MGRAY def isFail(g): return g in('U','UA','SA','RA','W') def total_gp(g): return sum(GP.get(v,0) for v in g.values()) def calc_gpa(s): g=s['grades']; n=len(g) or 8 return round(total_gp(g)/n,2) def count_arr(g): return sum(1 for v in g.values() if isFail(v)) doc=SimpleDocTemplate(OUT,pagesize=landscape(A4), leftMargin=10*mm,rightMargin=10*mm,topMargin=10*mm,bottomMargin=10*mm) story=[] # Dynamic header — from INST only story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examBody',''),ps('T',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=14,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('officeLabel',''),ps('S',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examSession',''),ps('S2',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=4))) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=2,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=3)) story.append(Paragraph('RESULT ANALYSIS — SCORE CARD & RANK LIST',ps('H1',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=12,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(f"Department: {INST.get('branch','')}",ps('H2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=BLUE,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f"Inst: {INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')} | " f"Reg: {INST.get('regulation','')} | " f"Filtered: {SEM_LABEL} | " f"Students: {len(STUDENTS)} | Date: {INST.get('datePublication','')}", ps('Sm',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=4))) banner=f"RANK LIST | {SEM_LABEL} | Students: {len(STUDENTS)} | Date: {INST.get('datePublication','')}" bt=Table([[banner]],colWidths=[277*mm]) bt.setStyle(TableStyle([('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,-1),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,-1),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,-1),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,-1),10), ('ALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'CENTER'),('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),6),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),6)])) story.append(bt) story.append(Spacer(1,6)) # Grade system table story.append(Paragraph(f"Grade Point System ({INST.get('regulation','2021')} Regulation)", ps('GPH',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=NAVY,spaceAfter=3))) gs=[[ Paragraph('Grade',ps('gh',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('O',ps('go',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('A+',ps('gap',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('A',ps('ga',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('B+',ps('gbp',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('B',ps('gb',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('U/RA',ps('gu',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('SA',ps('gsa',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)) ], [Paragraph('GP',ps('gp',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)),'10','9','8','7','6','0','0'], [Paragraph('Desc.',ps('gd',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=7,alignment=TA_CENTER)),'Outstanding','Excellent','Very Good','Good','Average','Fail-Exam','Fail-Attend.'] ] gst=Table(gs,colWidths=[22*mm]*8) gst.setStyle(TableStyle([ ('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(0,-1),BLUE_L),('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),BLUE_L), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,-1),'Helvetica'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,-1),8), ('ALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'CENTER'),('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'), ('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.5,colors.HexColor('#9fa8da')),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),14), ('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3), ('BACKGROUND',(1,1),(3,-1),GREEN_LT), ('BACKGROUND',(4,1),(5,-1),colors.HexColor('#e3f2fd')), ('BACKGROUND',(6,1),(6,-1),RED_LT), ('BACKGROUND',(7,1),(7,-1),colors.HexColor('#fff3e0')), ])) story.append(gst) story.append(Spacer(1,7)) # Top 5 medals=['1st','2nd','3rd','4th','5th'] medal_bg=[colors.HexColor('#FFD700'),colors.HexColor('#C0C0C0'), colors.HexColor('#CD7F32'),BLUE_L,BLUE_L] top5=STUDENTS[:5] t5h=[[Paragraph(f'{h}',ps('t5h',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,textColor=WHITE,alignment=TA_CENTER)) for h in ['Medal','Reg. No.','Name','Total GP','GPA','Status']]] for i,s in enumerate(top5): tgp=total_gp(s['grades']);gv=calc_gpa(s) t5h.append([ Paragraph(f'{medals[i]}',ps('m',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9, textColor=colors.HexColor('#5d4037') if i<=2 else NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(s['regNo'],ps('r',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}',ps('n',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9)), Paragraph(f'{tgp}',ps('tgp',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{gv:.2f}',ps('gv',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=GREEN_DK,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('All Pass',ps('ap',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=GREEN_DK,alignment=TA_CENTER)), ]) t5t=Table(t5h,colWidths=[16*mm,32*mm,50*mm,18*mm,18*mm,22*mm]) t5st=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.5,colors.HexColor('#9fa8da')), ('ALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'CENTER'),('ALIGN',(2,1),(2,-1),'LEFT'), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16), ('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3)] for i in range(min(5,len(top5))): t5st.append(('BACKGROUND',(0,i+1),(-1,i+1),medal_bg[i])) t5t.setStyle(TableStyle(t5st)) ac=sum(1 for s in STUDENTS if count_arr(s['grades'])==0) one=sum(1 for s in STUDENTS if count_arr(s['grades'])==1) two=sum(1 for s in STUDENTS if count_arr(s['grades'])==2) thr=sum(1 for s in STUDENTS if count_arr(s['grades'])==3) mor=sum(1 for s in STUDENTS if count_arr(s['grades'])>=4) tot=len(STUDENTS) def gpa_range(cond): vals=[calc_gpa(s) for s in STUDENTS if cond(s)] return f'{min(vals):.2f}-{max(vals):.2f}' if vals else '-' arr_data=[ [Paragraph('Group',ps('ah',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph('Count',ps('ah2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('%',ps('ah3',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('GPA Range',ps('ah4',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER))], [Paragraph('All Pass',ps('ab',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph(f'{ac}',ps('av',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), f'{ac/tot*100:.1f}%',gpa_range(lambda s:count_arr(s['grades'])==0)], ['1 Arrear',str(one),f'{one/tot*100:.1f}%',gpa_range(lambda s:count_arr(s['grades'])==1)], ['2 Arrears',str(two),f'{two/tot*100:.1f}%',gpa_range(lambda s:count_arr(s['grades'])==2)], [Paragraph('3 Arrears',ps('a3',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8,textColor=RED_DK)), Paragraph(str(thr),ps('v3',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=RED_DK,alignment=TA_CENTER)), f'{thr/tot*100:.1f}%',gpa_range(lambda s:count_arr(s['grades'])==3)], [Paragraph('4+ Arrears (SA)',ps('a4',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8,textColor=RED_DK)), Paragraph(str(mor),ps('v4',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=RED_DK,alignment=TA_CENTER)), f'{mor/tot*100:.1f}%',gpa_range(lambda s:count_arr(s['grades'])>=4)], [Paragraph('Total',ps('tot',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=NAVY)), Paragraph(f'{tot}',ps('tv',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), '100%',gpa_range(lambda s:True)], ] arr_t=Table(arr_data,colWidths=[44*mm,20*mm,20*mm,28*mm]) arr_t.setStyle(TableStyle([ ('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-2),[WHITE,LGRAY]), ('BACKGROUND',(0,1),(-1,1),GREEN_LT),('BACKGROUND',(0,-1),(-1,-1),BLUE_L), ('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.5,colors.HexColor('#9fa8da')), ('ALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'CENTER'),('ALIGN',(0,1),(0,-1),'LEFT'), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16), ('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3), ('LEFTPADDING',(0,1),(0,-1),5), ])) sl=Table([[Paragraph('Top 5 Rank Holders',ps('sl',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY))],[t5t]],colWidths=[160*mm]) sr=Table([[Paragraph('Arrear Group Summary',ps('sr',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY))],[arr_t]],colWidths=[115*mm]) combo=Table([[sl,Spacer(4,1),sr]],colWidths=[160*mm,4*mm,115*mm]) combo.setStyle(TableStyle([('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'TOP'),('LEFTPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),0),('RIGHTPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),0)])) story.append(combo) story.append(Spacer(1,7)) # Full rank list scodes=list(dict.fromkeys([c for s in STUDENTS for c in s['grades'].keys()])) n_sub=len(scodes) story.append(Paragraph(f'Complete Rank List — All {tot} Students | {SEM_LABEL}', ps('rlh',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f'GPA = Total GP ÷ {n_sub} subjects | SA = Shortage of Attendance | All-pass names in bold', ps('note',fontName='Helvetica-Oblique',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,spaceAfter=3))) base_cw=[10*mm,9*mm,25*mm,38*mm] subj_cw=[max(12*mm,180//n_sub*mm)]*n_sub col_w=base_cw+subj_cw+[14*mm,12*mm,10*mm,16*mm] def hc(t): return Paragraph(f'{t}',ps('hc',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=7,alignment=TA_CENTER,textColor=WHITE)) def hc2(t): return Paragraph(t,ps('hc2',fontName='Helvetica-Oblique',fontSize=6,alignment=TA_CENTER,textColor=colors.HexColor('#bbdefb'))) hrow1=[hc('Rank'),hc('S.No'),hc('Reg. No.'),hc('Name')]+[hc(c) for c in scodes]+[hc('Total\nGP'),hc('GPA'),hc('Arr.'),hc('Status')] hrow2=[hc2('')]*4+[hc2(SUBJECTS.get(c,[c])[0][:12] if SUBJECTS.get(c) else c) for c in scodes]+[hc2(f'/{n_sub*10}'),hc2('/10.0'),hc2(''),hc2('')] data_rows=[hrow1,hrow2] status_bgs={0:GREEN_LT,1:colors.HexColor('#fff9c4'),2:colors.HexColor('#ffe0b2'),3:RED_LT} row_bgs={} for s in STUDENTS: g=s['grades'];tgp=total_gp(g);gv=calc_gpa(s);arr_cnt=count_arr(g) if arr_cnt==0: st,sc,nb='All Pass',GREEN_DK,True elif arr_cnt>=4: st,sc,nb=f'{arr_cnt} Arr(SA)',RED_DK,False elif arr_cnt==1: st,sc,nb='1 Arrear',AMBER,False else: st,sc,nb=f'{arr_cnt} Arrears',RED_DK,False gv_col=GREEN_DK if arr_cnt==0 else(AMBER if arr_cnt<=2 else RED_DK) row=[ Paragraph(str(s['rank']),ps('rc',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(str(s['sno']),ps('rc2',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(s['regNo'],ps('rc3',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}' if nb else s['name'], ps('rc4',fontName='Helvetica-Bold' if nb else 'Helvetica',fontSize=8,leftIndent=2)), ] for code in scodes: grd=g.get(code,'-') row.append(Paragraph(f'{grd}', ps('gc',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER))) arr_col=GREEN_DK if arr_cnt==0 else RED_DK row+=[ Paragraph(f'{tgp}',ps('tgp',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{gv:.2f}',ps('gv',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=gv_col,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{arr_cnt}', ps('ac',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{st}', ps('sc2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=7,alignment=TA_CENTER)), ] ri=len(data_rows) row_bgs[ri]=status_bgs.get(min(arr_cnt,3),colors.HexColor('#fff9c4')) data_rows.append(row) rl_t=Table(data_rows,colWidths=col_w) bs=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('BACKGROUND',(0,1),(-1,1),BLUE), ('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,1),WHITE),('FONTNAME',(0,2),(-1,-1),'Helvetica'), ('FONTSIZE',(0,2),(-1,-1),8),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.4,colors.HexColor('#9fa8da')), ('ALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'CENTER'),('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'), ('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3), ('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(1,-1),18), ('LINEBELOW',(0,1),(-1,1),1.5,GOLD), ('LINEAFTER',(3,0),(3,-1),1.2,colors.HexColor('#5c6bc0')), ('LINEAFTER',(3+n_sub,0),(3+n_sub,-1),1.2,colors.HexColor('#5c6bc0'))] for ri,bg in row_bgs.items(): bs.append(('BACKGROUND',(0,ri),(-1,ri),bg)) rl_t.setStyle(TableStyle(bs)) story.append(rl_t) story.append(Spacer(1,8)) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=1,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=4)) ft=Table([[ Paragraph('HOD / DEPARTMENT',ps('fl',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY)), Paragraph(f'Generated via n8n + Gemini 2.0 Flash | {INST.get("regulation","")} Regulation | {SEM_LABEL}', ps('fc',fontName='Helvetica-Oblique',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('PRINCIPAL',ps('fr',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_RIGHT)), ]],colWidths=[70*mm,137*mm,70*mm]) ft.setStyle(TableStyle([('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('LEFTPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),0),('RIGHTPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),0)])) story.append(ft) doc.build(story) print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','file':OUT})) PYEOF

nodes.name: PDF 1 — Score Card + Rank List
nodes.notes: Landscape A4. Dynamic header from PDF via Gemini. No hardcoded college name.

parameters.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4 from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, HRFlowable from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib import colors from reportlab.lib.units import mm from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_CENTER INST=json.loads(os.environ['INST']) DATA=json.loads(os.environ['ARREAR_STUDENTS']) STATS=json.loads(os.environ['STATS']) SUBJECTS=json.loads(os.environ['SUBJECTS']) SEM_LABEL=os.environ.get('SEM_LABEL','All Semesters') OUT=os.environ.get('OUT','/tmp/02_Arrear_Analysis.pdf') NAVY=colors.HexColor('#1a237e');AU_L=colors.HexColor('#e8eaf6');AU_B=colors.HexColor('#9fa8da') GREEN=colors.HexColor('#1b5e20');RED=colors.HexColor('#b71c1c');MGRAY=colors.HexColor('#757575');WHITE=colors.white def ps(n,**k): return ParagraphStyle(n,**k) def hx(c): return c.hexval()[2:] TBL=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('FONTSIZE',(0,1),(-1,-1),8),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.3,AU_B), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4)] doc=SimpleDocTemplate(OUT,pagesize=A4,leftMargin=12*mm,rightMargin=12*mm,topMargin=12*mm,bottomMargin=12*mm) story=[] story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examBody',''),ps('T',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=14,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('officeLabel',''),ps('S',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=2,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=4)) story.append(Paragraph('ARREAR ANALYSIS REPORT',ps('MT',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=13,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f"{INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')} | {INST.get('branch','')} | {SEM_LABEL}", ps('Sm',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=5))) tot=STATS['total'] story.append(Paragraph('Summary Statistics',ps('H1',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=4))) sd=[ ['Total Students',str(tot),'All Clear',f"{STATS['allClear']} ({STATS['passPercentage']}%)"], ['Students with Arrears',f"{STATS['withArrears']}", 'Total Arrear Subjects',str(STATS['totalArrearCount'])], ['Pass Percentage',f"{STATS['passPercentage']}%",'Avg Arrears / Failing Student',str(STATS.get('avgArrearsPerFailStudent','-'))], ['Class GPA Average',f"{STATS['avgGPA']:.2f} / 10.00",'Regulation',INST.get('regulation','')] ] st=Table(sd,colWidths=[65*mm,30*mm,60*mm,35*mm]) st.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,0),(-1,-1),[WHITE,AU_L]), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(0,-1),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTNAME',(2,0),(2,-1),'Helvetica-Bold'), ('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16)])) story.append(st) story.append(Spacer(1,8)) story.append(Paragraph('Detailed Arrear List',ps('H2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=4))) hdr=[['#','Reg. Number','Student Name','Arrear Count','Failed Subjects (Code — Name — Grade)']] rows=[] for i,s in enumerate(DATA,1): arr=s.get('arrears',[]) lines=[f"{a['code']} — {SUBJECTS.get(a['code'],[a['code']])[0]} [{a['grade']}]" for a in arr] rows.append([str(i),s['regNo'], Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}',ps('nn',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph(f'{len(arr)}',ps('nc',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=12,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph('
'.join(lines),ps('af',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8,leading=13))]) t=Table(hdr+rows,colWidths=[8*mm,30*mm,44*mm,16*mm,87*mm]) t.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,colors.HexColor('#fff8f8')]), ('TOPPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),5),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),5)])) story.append(t) story.append(Spacer(1,8)) story.append(Paragraph('SA = Shortage of Attendance (<75%). UA = Absent. Both = 0 Grade Points.', ps('nt',fontName='Helvetica-Oblique',fontSize=8,textColor=MGRAY))) doc.build(story) print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','file':OUT})) PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4 from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, HRFlowable from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib import colors from reportlab.lib.units import mm from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_CENTER INST=json.loads(os.environ['INST']) SWF=json.loads(os.environ['SWF']) SEM_LABEL=os.environ.get('SEM_LABEL','All Semesters') OUT=os.environ.get('OUT','/tmp/03_SubjectWise.pdf') NAVY=colors.HexColor('#1a237e');AU_L=colors.HexColor('#e8eaf6');AU_B=colors.HexColor('#9fa8da') GREEN=colors.HexColor('#1b5e20');RED=colors.HexColor('#b71c1c');AMBER=colors.HexColor('#e65100') MGRAY=colors.HexColor('#757575');WHITE=colors.white def ps(n,**k): return ParagraphStyle(n,**k) def hx(c): return c.hexval()[2:] TBL=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('FONTSIZE',(0,1),(-1,-1),8),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.3,AU_B), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4)] doc=SimpleDocTemplate(OUT,pagesize=A4,leftMargin=12*mm,rightMargin=12*mm,topMargin=12*mm,bottomMargin=12*mm) story=[] story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examBody',''),ps('T',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=14,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('officeLabel',''),ps('S',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=2,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=4)) story.append(Paragraph('SUBJECT-WISE ARREAR REPORT',ps('MT',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=13,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f"{INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')} | {INST.get('branch','')} | {SEM_LABEL}", ps('Sm',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=5))) for code,info in SWF.items(): pct=info['passRate'];pc=GREEN if pct>=85 else(AMBER if pct>=65 else RED) story.append(Paragraph(f"{code} — {info['subjectName']}", ps('sh',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=10,spaceAfter=2))) mt=Table([[f"Type: {info['type']}",f"Credits: {info['credits']}", f"Appeared: {info['appeared']}",f"Passed: {info['passed']}",f"Failed: {info['failedCount']}", Paragraph(f'Pass Rate: {pct}%',ps('pr',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9))]], colWidths=[34*mm,20*mm,22*mm,20*mm,18*mm,58*mm]) mt.setStyle(TableStyle([('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,-1),AU_L),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,-1),8), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,-1),'Helvetica'),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.3,AU_B), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),15), ('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),3)])) story.append(mt) fails=info['failedStudents'] if not fails: story.append(Paragraph('All students cleared this subject.', ps('ok',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,textColor=GREEN,spaceBefore=3,spaceAfter=6))) else: fh=[['#','Reg. Number','Student Name','Grade','Reason']] fr=[[str(i+1),s['regNo'], Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}',ps('fn',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph(f'{s["grade"]}',ps('fg',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,alignment=TA_CENTER)), 'Shortage of Attendance' if s['grade'] in('SA','UA') else 'Below Passing Marks (<50)'] for i,s in enumerate(fails)] ft=Table(fh+fr,colWidths=[8*mm,30*mm,70*mm,16*mm,58*mm]) ft.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),RED), ('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,colors.HexColor('#fff8f8')]), ('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),15)])) story.append(ft) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=0.4,color=AU_B,spaceBefore=5,spaceAfter=2)) doc.build(story) print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','file':OUT})) PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4 from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, HRFlowable from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib import colors from reportlab.lib.units import mm from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_CENTER INST=json.loads(os.environ['INST']) STUDENTS=json.loads(os.environ['STUDENTS']) STATS=json.loads(os.environ['STATS']) SWF=json.loads(os.environ['SWF']) GP=json.loads(os.environ['GP']) GL=json.loads(os.environ['GL']) SEM_LABEL=os.environ.get('SEM_LABEL','All Semesters') OUT=os.environ.get('OUT','/tmp/04_Statistics.pdf') NAVY=colors.HexColor('#1a237e');AU_L=colors.HexColor('#e8eaf6');AU_B=colors.HexColor('#9fa8da') GREEN=colors.HexColor('#1b5e20');RED=colors.HexColor('#b71c1c');AMBER=colors.HexColor('#e65100') MGRAY=colors.HexColor('#757575');WHITE=colors.white def ps(n,**k): return ParagraphStyle(n,**k) def hx(c): return c.hexval()[2:] def gcol(g): if g in('O','A+','A'): return GREEN if g in('B+','B'): return colors.HexColor('#283593') return RED TBL=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('FONTSIZE',(0,1),(-1,-1),8),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.3,AU_B), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4)] doc=SimpleDocTemplate(OUT,pagesize=A4,leftMargin=12*mm,rightMargin=12*mm,topMargin=12*mm,bottomMargin=12*mm) story=[] story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examBody',''),ps('T',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=14,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('officeLabel',''),ps('S',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=2,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=4)) story.append(Paragraph('OVERALL STATISTICS — PASS / FAIL ANALYSIS',ps('MT',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=13,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f"{INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')} | {INST.get('branch','')} | {SEM_LABEL}", ps('Sm',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=5))) story.append(Paragraph('Class Overview',ps('H1',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=4))) tot=STATS['total'] od=[ ['Institution',f"{INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')}", 'Regulation',INST.get('regulation','')], ['Total Students',str(tot),'Class GPA Average',f"{STATS['avgGPA']:.2f} / 10.00"], ['All Clear',f"{STATS['allClear']} ({STATS['passPercentage']}%)",'Highest GPA',str(STATS['maxGPA'])], ['With Arrears',f"{STATS['withArrears']} ({round(STATS['withArrears']/tot*100,1)}%)",'Lowest GPA',str(STATS['minGPA'])], ['Total Arrear Count',str(STATS['totalArrearCount']),'Semester Filter',SEM_LABEL] ] ot2=Table(od,colWidths=[50*mm,55*mm,45*mm,40*mm]) ot2.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,AU_L]), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(0,-1),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTNAME',(2,0),(2,-1),'Helvetica-Bold'), ('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16)])) story.append(ot2) story.append(Spacer(1,10)) story.append(Paragraph('Subject-wise Pass / Fail Statistics',ps('H2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=4))) sh=[['Code','Subject Name','Credits','Type','Appeared','Passed','Failed','Pass %','Verdict']] for code,info in SWF.items(): pct=info['passRate'] v='Excellent' if pct==100 else('Good' if pct>=85 else('Average' if pct>=70 else 'Poor')) vc=GREEN if pct>=85 else(AMBER if pct>=65 else RED) sh.append([ Paragraph(f'{code}',ps('c',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph(info['subjectName'],ps('n',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8)), str(info['credits']),info['type'],str(info['appeared']), Paragraph(f'{info["passed"]}',ps('p',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'0 else GREEN)}">{info["failedCount"]}',ps('f',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{pct}%',ps('pc',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{v}',ps('ve',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)) ]) st3=Table(sh,colWidths=[20*mm,60*mm,13*mm,26*mm,14*mm,14*mm,12*mm,14*mm,21*mm]) st3.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,AU_L]), ('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),18),('TOPPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),4)])) story.append(st3) story.append(Spacer(1,10)) story.append(Paragraph('Grade Frequency Distribution',ps('H3',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=4))) gf=STATS.get('gradeFrequency',{});total_g=sum(gf.values()) or 1 gh=[['Grade','Description','Grade Points','Count','Percentage']] for grd in['O','A+','A','B+','B','C','U','UA','SA']: cnt=gf.get(grd,0);pct2=round(cnt/total_g*100,1) desc=GL.get(grd,['','',''])[0] gc=gcol(grd) gh.append([ Paragraph(f'{grd}',ps('gg',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,alignment=TA_CENTER)), desc,str(GP.get(grd,0)), Paragraph(f'{cnt}',ps('gc2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'{pct2}%',ps('gp2',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,alignment=TA_CENTER)) ]) gt=Table(gh,colWidths=[18*mm,55*mm,28*mm,25*mm,60*mm]) gt.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,AU_L]),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16)])) story.append(gt) doc.build(story) print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','file':OUT})) PYEOF

python3 << 'PYEOF' import json, os from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import A4 from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle, HRFlowable from reportlab.lib.styles import ParagraphStyle from reportlab.lib import colors from reportlab.lib.units import mm from reportlab.lib.enums import TA_CENTER INST=json.loads(os.environ['INST']) STUDENTS=json.loads(os.environ['STUDENTS']) ARR=json.loads(os.environ['ARR']) STATS=json.loads(os.environ['STATS']) INSIGHT=os.environ.get('INSIGHT','No insight available.') SEM_LABEL=os.environ.get('SEM_LABEL','All Semesters') OUT=os.environ.get('OUT','/tmp/05_Insights.pdf') NAVY=colors.HexColor('#1a237e');AU_L=colors.HexColor('#e8eaf6');AU_B=colors.HexColor('#9fa8da') GREEN=colors.HexColor('#1b5e20');RED=colors.HexColor('#b71c1c');AMBER=colors.HexColor('#e65100') MGRAY=colors.HexColor('#757575');WHITE=colors.white def ps(n,**k): return ParagraphStyle(n,**k) def hx(c): return c.hexval()[2:] TBL=[('BACKGROUND',(0,0),(-1,0),NAVY),('TEXTCOLOR',(0,0),(-1,0),WHITE), ('FONTNAME',(0,0),(-1,0),'Helvetica-Bold'),('FONTSIZE',(0,0),(-1,0),8), ('FONTSIZE',(0,1),(-1,-1),8),('GRID',(0,0),(-1,-1),0.3,AU_B), ('VALIGN',(0,0),(-1,-1),'MIDDLE'),('TOPPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,0),(-1,-1),4)] doc=SimpleDocTemplate(OUT,pagesize=A4,leftMargin=12*mm,rightMargin=12*mm,topMargin=12*mm,bottomMargin=12*mm) story=[] story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('examBody',''),ps('T',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=14,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph(INST.get('officeLabel',''),ps('S',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=2,color=NAVY,spaceAfter=4)) story.append(Paragraph('AI-GENERATED INSIGHTS & RECOMMENDATIONS',ps('MT',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=13,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=2))) story.append(Paragraph( f"{INST.get('instCode','')} — {INST.get('instName','')} | {INST.get('branch','')} | {SEM_LABEL}", ps('Sm',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceAfter=5))) body=ps('B',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=9,textColor=colors.HexColor('#424242'),leading=14,spaceAfter=6) story.append(Paragraph('1. Gemini 2.0 Flash — Academic Performance Analysis', ps('H1',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=5))) for para in INSIGHT.split('\n\n'): if para.strip(): story.append(Paragraph(para.strip(),body)) story.append(Spacer(1,8)) story.append(Paragraph('2. Top Performers',ps('H2',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=5))) ac=[s for s in STUDENTS if s.get('allClear')] th=[['Rank','Reg. Number','Student Name','GPA','Status']] for i,s in enumerate(ac[:5],1): th.append([str(i),s['regNo'], Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}',ps('tn',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=9)), Paragraph(f'{s["gpa"]:.2f}',ps('tg',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,textColor=NAVY,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(f'ALL CLEAR',ps('ts',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER))]) tt=Table(th,colWidths=[12*mm,34*mm,72*mm,25*mm,38*mm]) tt.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[colors.HexColor('#f1f8e9'),WHITE]),('ROWHEIGHT',(0,0),(-1,-1),16)])) story.append(tt) story.append(Spacer(1,10)) story.append(Paragraph('3. Priority Intervention List',ps('H3',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=11,textColor=NAVY,spaceBefore=6,spaceAfter=5))) ch=[['Priority','Reg. No.','Name','Arrears','Recommended Action']] for s in ARR: cnt=len(s.get('arrears',[])) has_sa=any(a['grade'] in('SA','UA') for a in s.get('arrears',[])) pri='HIGH' if cnt>=3 or has_sa else 'MEDIUM' pc=RED if pri=='HIGH' else AMBER rec=('Attendance regularisation + arrear coaching' if has_sa else 'Intensive remedial coaching — multiple subjects' if cnt>=3 else 'Targeted coaching for failed subject') ch.append([ Paragraph(f'{pri}',ps('pi',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8,alignment=TA_CENTER)), s['regNo'],Paragraph(f'{s["name"]}',ps('pn',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=8)), Paragraph(f'{cnt}',ps('pa',fontName='Helvetica-Bold',fontSize=10,alignment=TA_CENTER)), Paragraph(rec,ps('rc',fontName='Helvetica',fontSize=8)) ]) ct=Table(ch,colWidths=[18*mm,32*mm,48*mm,15*mm,72*mm]) ct.setStyle(TableStyle(TBL+[('ROWBACKGROUNDS',(0,1),(-1,-1),[WHITE,colors.HexColor('#fff8f8')]), ('TOPPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),4),('BOTTOMPADDING',(0,1),(-1,-1),4)])) story.append(ct) story.append(HRFlowable(width='100%',thickness=0.5,color=AU_B,spaceBefore=12)) story.append(Paragraph( f"Auto-generated via n8n + Gemini 2.0 Flash | Institution: {INST.get('instName','')} | {INST.get('regulation','')} Regulation | All data extracted from uploaded PDF.", ps('fn',fontName='Helvetica-Oblique',fontSize=7,textColor=MGRAY,alignment=TA_CENTER,spaceBefore=4))) doc.build(story) print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','file':OUT})) PYEOF

nodes.name: Merge — Wait for All PDFs
nodes.notes: Connect the TRUE output of each IF node here (5 inputs). FALSE outputs are not connected — skipped PDFs won't block the merge.

nodes.name: Gmail — Reply with PDFs
nodes.notes: Replies in same email thread. Only attaches PDFs that were generated. Use same Gmail OAuth2 credential as the trigger.

_SETUP_GUIDE.step_1_server: pip install pdfplumber reportlab  (on your n8n server)
_SETUP_GUIDE.step_2_gemini: Get free key → https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey  |  n8n Settings > Environment Variables > GEMINI_API_KEY=your_key
_SETUP_GUIDE.step_3_gmail: n8n Credentials > Add Gmail OAuth2 credential > connect to both Gmail Trigger + Gmail Reply nodes
_SETUP_GUIDE.step_4_import: n8n > Settings > Import Workflow > upload this JSON file
_SETUP_GUIDE.step_5_use: Email yourself the AU result PDF. Subject = your command (see examples below)
_SETUP_GUIDE.zero_hardcoded_text: Institution name, address, branch, regulation — all extracted from the PDF by Gemini. Nothing is hardcoded in any node.

_PROJECT.name: ResultAnalyser
_PROJECT.creator: Dhanush D
_PROJECT.description: AI-powered university result analysis — triggered by Gmail, built on n8n + Gemini 2.0 Flash
_PROJECT.tagline: Email a result PDF. Get 5 analysis reports in 60 seconds.
